title: Software Update - DFU - Entering airplane mode during update
scenario: DFU fails with "Houston..." error when airplane mode is enabled during firmware update, then recovers and completes after retry
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
Navigate to Home screen and select the connected Poly audio device.
Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) on the device.
While the DFU is in progress (between 0–20% completion, or 0–10% if updating a headset and charge case/stand simultaneously), enable Airplane Mode on the mobile device.
Wait for the update to fail.
Turn off Airplane Mode on the mobile device.
On the error screen, tap the "Retry" button.
Wait for the update to restart and complete.
expected: After enabling Airplane Mode during the DFU, a "Houston..." error page should appear indicating the update failed. After turning off Airplane Mode and tapping "Retry", the update should restart and finish successfully.
